# polarisopt

> polarisopt is a Python library for design-of-experiments and Bayesian optimization
> targeting the POLARIS agent-based transportation simulator. Master/slave architecture:
> a lightweight master Python process holds study state in a SQLite SampleStore and
> submits one sbatch job per sample evaluation. Every algorithm and infrastructure
> component (designs, surrogates, acquisitions, generators, stopping criteria, metrics,
> simulators, runners, transfers) is an ABC with a plugin registry, configured via YAML.

## Quick facts

- Python 3.11+, BSD 3-Clause, src layout, hatchling build
- 138 unit/integration tests + 13 doctests, ruff and mypy clean
- BoTorch + GPyTorch behind thin ABCs (in `[bo]` extra)
- SQLite via SQLAlchemy for SampleStore (WAL mode)
- pydantic + Jinja2 for study YAML
- Default install does NOT require POLARIS, BoTorch, or polaris-studio

## Install

```
pip install polarisopt              # core
pip install 'polarisopt[bo]'        # + Bayesian opt
pip install 'polarisopt[anl]'       # + ANL Globus integration (polaris-studio)
pip install 'polarisopt[dev]'       # + dev tooling (pytest, ruff, mypy, mkdocs)
```

## Quick start

```
polarisopt run study.yaml          # run all phases
polarisopt status study.yaml       # per-phase sample counts
polarisopt resume study.yaml       # pick up where it stopped
polarisopt cancel study.yaml 42    # scancel and CANCELLED status for sample id 42
polarisopt abort study.yaml        # cancel all non-terminal samples
polarisopt logs study.yaml 42 -f   # tail -f the sample's stdout/stderr
```

## Architecture summary

Master process (polarisopt run) holds:
  - SampleStore: SQLite-backed, single source of truth for (X, Y, status, folder, ...)
  - StudyRunner: builds plugins from YAML, dispatches phases
  - Per-phase Study: StaticDesignStudy or SequentialDesignStudy
  - Surrogate, Acquisition, SampleGenerator: math layer
  - StoppingCriterion: when to halt
  - Metric: simulator output -> objective vector
  - Simulator: prepare(sample) -> JobSpec; collect_output(sample) -> dict
  - Transfer: file copy backend (local, anl/Globus)
  - Runner: submit/status/cancel per Sample

Slaves: POLARIS C++ binaries running on Slurm compute nodes,
        executed as the JobSpec.command from prepare().

The master never imports POLARIS. The boundary is the Runner ABC.

## Pluggable families

Each family has a base ABC, a `<family>_registry`, and a `make_<family>(spec)` factory.

Design (static DOE):       lhs, morris, sobol, manual
Surrogate (BO model):      gp                                  (requires [bo])
Acquisition:               ei, qei, qehvi                      (requires [bo])
Generator (sequential):    random, acquisition
Stop:                      max_iter, epsilon, plateau, hypervolume, any, all
Metric:                    identity, link_moe, choice_share
Simulator:                 mock (Branin/Rosenbrock/Hartmann6/quadratic), polaris
Runner:                    local, slurm
Transfer:                  local, anl                          (anl needs [anl])

## YAML structure

```
name: <str>                            # study identifier (also SampleStore key)
workspace: <path>                      # root for experiments/, logs/, scripts/, polarisopt.db
seed: <int|null>

simulator:  { type: <name>, options: {...} }
runner:     { type: <name>, options: {..., poll_interval, orphan_threshold} }
parameters: { source: <path> | inline: [<record>, ...] }
metric:     { type: <name>, options: {...} }

phases:                                # at least one
  - name: <str>
    type: static
    design: { type: <name>, options: {...} }

  - name: <str>
    type: sequential
    warm_up: { type: <name>, options: {...} }   # optional
    generator:
      type: acquisition
      options:
        surrogate:   { type: <name>, options: {...} }
        acquisition: { type: <name>, options: {...} }
    batch_size: <int>
    minimize: <bool>
    stop:
      type: <combinator-or-criterion>
      criteria: [<StopConfig>, ...]             # for any/all
      options: {...}
```

Jinja2 globals available in YAML: env.<NAME>, now('<strftime>').

## Where things live

| Path                                | Role                                                |
|-------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------|
| src/polarisopt/parameters/          | ParameterSpace, POLARIS JSON injection              |
| src/polarisopt/samples/             | Sample dataclass, SQLite SampleStore                |
| src/polarisopt/config/              | pydantic study YAML schema + Jinja2 loader          |
| src/polarisopt/design/              | LHS, Morris, Sobol, Manual                          |
| src/polarisopt/surrogates/          | GP via BoTorch SingleTaskGP / ModelListGP           |
| src/polarisopt/acquisition/         | LogEI, qLogEI, qLogEHVI                             |
| src/polarisopt/generators/          | random, acquisition (batch-first)                   |
| src/polarisopt/stop/                | Stopping criteria + any/all combinators             |
| src/polarisopt/metrics/             | identity, link_moe, choice_share                    |
| src/polarisopt/simulator/           | Simulator ABC, MockSimulator, PolarisSimulator      |
| src/polarisopt/runners/             | Runner ABC + Local + Slurm                          |
| src/polarisopt/transfer/            | Transfer ABC + Local + ANL Globus                   |
| src/polarisopt/studies/             | Static, Sequential, StudyRunner, ops                |
| src/polarisopt/utils/               | logging, paths, registry                            |
| src/polarisopt/cli.py               | polarisopt run|status|resume|cancel|abort|logs      |
| src/polarisopt/eqsql_compat.py      | Drop-in shim for polaris.hpc.eqsql                  |

## Top public API

```python
# Domain
from polarisopt.parameters import Parameter, ParameterSpace, ParameterType
from polarisopt.samples    import Sample, SampleStatus, SampleStore

# Configuration
from polarisopt.config     import StudyConfig, load_study_config, render_yaml

# Orchestration
from polarisopt.studies    import (
    StudyRunner, StaticDesignStudy, SequentialDesignStudy,
    cancel_sample, abort_study, sample_log_paths,
)

# Pluggable families (each module exports its ABC, builtins, factory, registry)
from polarisopt.design      import Design, LHSDesign, MorrisDesign, SobolDesign, ManualDesign
from polarisopt.surrogates  import Surrogate
from polarisopt.acquisition import AcquisitionFunction
from polarisopt.generators  import SampleGenerator, GeneratorContext
from polarisopt.stop        import StoppingCriterion
from polarisopt.metrics     import Metric, IdentityMetric, LinkMoeMetric, ChoiceShareMetric
from polarisopt.simulator   import Simulator, MockSimulator, PolarisSimulator, BENCHMARKS
from polarisopt.runners     import Runner, LocalRunner, SlurmRunner, SlurmResources
from polarisopt.transfer    import Transfer, LocalTransfer

# Compat
from polarisopt import eqsql_compat
```

## How to add a plugin

1. Subclass the ABC under `src/polarisopt/<family>/<short_name>.py`.
2. Decorate with `@<family>_registry.register("plugin_name")`.
3. Implement the abstract methods; NumPy-style docstring with Examples.
4. Add unit tests in `tests/unit/test_<family>_<name>.py`.
5. Export from the family's `__init__.py` if public.
6. Reference from YAML: `{type: plugin_name, options: {...}}`.

For external plugins, import the module before invoking the CLI so the
@register decorator runs.

## Key files for AI agents to read

- `AGENTS.md`                                       Project conventions, do/don't list
- `docs/concepts/master-slave.md`                   Architectural overview
- `docs/concepts/plugin-registries.md`              How plugin lookup works
- `docs/concepts/bayesian-optimization.md`          BO algorithm tour
- `docs/concepts/multi-objective.md`                Pareto vs scalarization
- `docs/concepts/restart-correctness.md`            What survives a crash and why
- `docs/yaml-reference.md`                          Full study YAML schema
- `docs/reference/cli.md`                           Complete CLI surface

## Style red flags

- Importing torch/botorch/polarislib at module top level outside the
  designated modules.
- print() in library code (use logging.getLogger(__name__) instead).
- Mutating Sample without store.update().
- Bare `except:` or silent except.
- os.chdir() in library code.
- pickle on user-controlled data.
- np.random module global state (use explicit np.random.Generator).

## Status (v0.2.0)

- Production-grade scaffolding complete
- Full sequential + static DOE pipelines working end-to-end with mock simulator
- Real POLARIS smoke test on Crossover cluster TBD
- Future work: entry-point-based plugin discovery, retry-failed CLI subcommand,
  N-dimensional hypervolume stop, multi-task GP surrogates
